name: Newmont Corporation

latest_note.title: FY2025 10-K Analysis
latest_note.title_th: การวิเคราะห์รายงานประจำปี FY2025
latest_note.summary: [Financial Performance] Newmont delivered a transformative year with net income surging to $7.2B from $3.3B, driven by robust gold prices and strategic portfolio actions. While attributable gold produ…

top_risks: Newmont faces a multifaceted risk profile dominated by commodity price volatility and project execution challenges, with significant exposure to metal market fluctuations and capital project risks

The company manages these through portfolio optimization, hedging strategies, and operational discipline, though remains vulnerable to external market forces and geopolitical factors across its global operations
Environmental compliance and cost management present ongoing challenges in maintaining profitability
one_liner: Newmont delivered a transformative year with net income surging to $7.2B from $3.3B, driven by robust gold prices and strategic portfolio actions.
